faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in Orange, NJ?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in Orange typically ranges from $800 to $4,000 depending on the extent of infestation, property size, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees, ensuring you understand all costs upfront before any work begins.

faqs.question: What termite treatment methods do you use in Orange?
faqs.answer: We offer liquid termiticide barrier treatments, termite baiting systems, and localized spot treatments depending on your property's needs. Our technicians assess your Orange home's construction type, infestation level, and surrounding environment to recommend the most effective solution for long-term termite elimination.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat termites in Orange, NJ?
faqs.answer: We typically schedule termite inspections in Orange within 24-48 hours of your call. Once the inspection is complete and treatment is approved, most termite treatments can begin within 3-5 business days, with emergency services available for severe infestations threatening structural integrity.

faqs.question: Do you offer termite treatment warranties in Orange?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our termite treatments in Orange come with comprehensive warranties ranging from 1 to 5 years depending on the treatment method used. We also offer annual inspection programs to monitor your property and ensure continued protection against future termite activity.
